report.title: SNR Edu ERP Platform - QA Verification Report (UPDATED)

admin_dashboard_features.name: Dashboard Overview
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Stats cards (Students: 2), Visual Insights, Recent Admissions, Quick Notices
admin_dashboard_features.expected: Dashboard with school statistics and quick actions

admin_dashboard_features.name: Add Session
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Session form with name input, active toggle, create button, session list

admin_dashboard_features.name: Add Class
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Session dropdown, class name, sort order, sections input, class table

admin_dashboard_features.name: Add Subject
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Session/Class dropdowns, subject name, code, teacher, subject table

admin_dashboard_features.name: Add Non-Subject
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Similar to Add Subject for co-curricular

admin_dashboard_features.name: Add Student
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Complete form: photo, name, DOB, class, parent details, address, Aadhaar

admin_dashboard_features.name: Search Student
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Class dropdown, student table with ID/Roll/Name, Export Excel
admin_dashboard_features.expected: Student search with filters and export

admin_dashboard_features.name: Upload Student (Bulk Import)
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Download Template button, file upload, import instructions

admin_dashboard_features.name: Promote Student
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Section ID not found in HTML, defaults to dashboard

admin_dashboard_features.name: Pickup ID Print
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Section renders but console error: DocumentReference.collection() called with empty path
admin_dashboard_features.expected: Print pickup ID cards for students

admin_dashboard_features.name: Student RFID Update
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Section renders but console error: DocumentReference.collection() called with empty path

admin_dashboard_features.name: Class Timetables
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Session dropdown, class list, timetable upload/display

admin_dashboard_features.name: Timetable Builder
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Session/Class dropdowns, period config, weekly grid with time slots

admin_dashboard_features.name: Grading Rules
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Section ID not found, defaults to dashboard

admin_dashboard_features.name: Create Exams
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Section ID not found, defaults to dashboard

admin_dashboard_features.name: Bulk Marks Entry
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Section ID not found, defaults to dashboard

admin_dashboard_features.name: View Report Card
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Session/Class/Student dropdowns, Generate Report button

admin_dashboard_features.name: Publish Results
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Session selector, student results table with publish toggles

admin_dashboard_features.name: Student Fee Payment
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Student search, ledger table, payment form, receipt generation

admin_dashboard_features.name: Demand Receipt
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Session/Class/Due Date/Till Month, Preview, Generate & Print, Export PDF, Overdue filter

admin_dashboard_features.name: Bulk Discount
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Fixed/Percentage discount, Apply to Selected/All

admin_dashboard_features.name: Bulk Extra Fee
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Session/Class/Fee Type/Amount/Due Date, Apply button

admin_dashboard_features.name: Late Fee Fine Rule
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Fine Amount, Type (Fixed/Daily/Percentage), Grace Period

admin_dashboard_features.name: Fee Master
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Session filter, fee structure table with Name/Class/Amount/Frequency

admin_dashboard_features.name: Search Fee Dues
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Defaulter list, Session/Class filters, Export Excel, summary bar

admin_dashboard_features.name: Send Fee Message
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Session/Class/Filter, Message template with variables, Send buttons

admin_dashboard_features.name: Fee Carry Forward
admin_dashboard_features.observed: From/To Session, Preview Dues, Execute button

admin_dashboard_features.name: Book Catalog
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Add New Book form, catalog table

admin_dashboard_features.name: Manage Routes
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Route management with stops and bus details

admin_dashboard_features.name: Add Employee
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Employee registration form

admin_dashboard_features.name: Search Employee
admin_dashboard_features.observed: Employee search/list

defects.description: 34 Firestore 'query requires an index' errors across exams, classes, library modules
defects.reproduction: Login → navigate to Exam, Library, or Class sections
defects.recommendation: Create composite indexes via Firebase console links in error messages
Upload missing images or fix asset paths

defects.description: DocumentReference.collection() called with empty path in Pickup ID and RFID modules
defects.reproduction: Navigate to Pickup ID Print or Student RFID Update
defects.recommendation: Fix schoolData() calls to resolve schoolId before collection access

defects.description: 8 sidebar menu items have section IDs that don't match HTML elements
defects.reproduction: Click Promote Student, Monthly Fee Payment, Add Fee Payment, Grading Rules, Create Exams, Bulk Marks Entry, Holiday List, Events & News
defects.recommendation: Fix showSection() onclick handlers to match actual HTML section IDs

defects.description: Dashboard stats Loading indefinitely for Teachers, Monthly Fees, Attendance
defects.recommendation: Fix Firestore queries for dashboard statistics

defects.description: Super Admin portal redirects to school website
defects.reproduction: Click 'Enter Super Admin' on landing page

defects.description: Student Portal Resources section shows 'Error loading materials'
defects.reproduction: Click Resources in Student Portal sidebar
defects.recommendation: Create Firestore composite index for materials collection
